properties.name: app.s3.enabled
properties.description: Use S3-compatible object storage (MinIO, cloud providers, etc.).

properties.name: app.s3.endpoint
properties.description: Custom S3 endpoint URL, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:9000 for MinIO.

properties.name: app.s3.region
properties.description: Region id (required by some S3-compatible providers).

properties.name: app.s3.path-style-access
properties.description: false: virtual-hosted URLs for regional cloud S3; true: path-style (MinIO, custom gateways).

properties.name: app.s3.public-base-url
properties.description: Public base URL for browser (no trailing slash), e.g. https://cdn.example.com or http://localhost:9000/bucket.
